span.p:
P0 基础工程
repo skeleton, CLI,
fixtures, tests

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
P1 标准建模
S1000D-like XML
DMC/ICN/PM/BREX/SNS

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
P2 数据管线
canonical JSON
validation findings
RDF triples

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
P3 基础检索
BM25 baseline
retrieval eval

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
P4 向量检索
dense embeddings
Qdrant HNSW
FAISS baseline

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
P5 高级RAG
SPLADE, ColBERT,
RRF, rerank, HyDE,
adaptive context

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:

versioned named graphs

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

P7 多智能体

critic + judge

span.p:

streaming, cache,
load test, traces

P9 作品集收尾
benchmark tables

JD coverage matrix
